description: Configure the documentation-oriented paths that remain writable before plan approval. Anything outside this surface still requires an approved plan.
model_guidance: Use this file to understand the pre-approval write lane before you touch repo files.
Keep every path repo-relative and normalized; do not rely on ../ escapes or runtime path tricks.
Treat these allow lists as documentation, ticketing, command, local-skill, metadata, and planning-artifact paths only.
Do not treat this config as permission to bypass plan approval for implementation, review, QA, handoff, plugin, tool, or workflow-state files.
You may narrow these allow lists inside the documented planning surfaces, but the stage gate still blocks the unsafe runtime areas by default.
